titleStmt.title: SII 10.400: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu

No. 400. (A.R. No. 272 of 1905.) ON A SLAB BUILT INTO THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SHRINE OF RĀMADĒVA IN THE PRĀKĀRA OF THE TEMPLE OF TRIPURĀNTAKĒŚVARA, TRIPURĀNTAKAM, MĀRKAPUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT. Ś. 118[5]. (Rudhirōdgāri)

summary.p: States that Karumāṇikka Perumāḍi-Nāyaka gave lands in the village of Abhinava-Gaṇapāvuram to god Tripurāntakadēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
©svastiśrīsamastabhuvanapraśastavibhava sakalasaṁpat prabhava pratisamara samarōttuṁgaturaṁgamasahasra
tacārucāmaraprakaravikāsitāśākāśāvakāśa bharatabhagīrathasaṁkāśa Anitarapauruṣātiśayita śrīvatsalāṁchana
bhalāṁchana kāṁcīpuravarādhīśvara pratāpalaṁkēśvara kāmakōṭyaṁbikālabdha varaprasāda narasa saṁvāda bhūrlōkacāturvva
rṇadharmmapratiṣṭācāryya nirupamadhairyya śrīparvatapūrvadigbhāgasupratiṣṭhitasapta śatāgrahāra pratikūlalōkasaṁ
hāra praśamitavibudhajanavipadapāya rāhuttarāya pratāpānurāgākrāṁtasakalabhūpāla vijayagaṁḍagōpā
ḷa pādapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmaṁtādhipati vāḷivaṁtanāyakavaranaṁdana vibhavasa
ṁkraṁdana yadhāvasaraviniyujyamānaṣāḍguṇyavaśaṁvadāśēṣakṣitipati bāhattariniyōgādhipati satatānuba
ddha budhyutsāhātirēkātmasurasacivamatipariṇati Anēkadēśādhipati turaṁgamakalācāturyya yadharita jayaṁttapē
saṇahanūmaṁta vividharājanītividyāpārāyaṇa nāyakanārāyaṇa nissādhāraṇa ṟiragu
nilaya tiruveṁgaḷanādhacaraṇālaya saṁśritajanasaṁtāpanivāraṇa dvihastamadaharaṇa Atiśa
yitakalpadrumavitaraṇa satyābharaṇa vairināyakaragaṁḍa svāmidrōharagaṁḍa Āśritajana saṁtāna sa
kaladharmmapratipālakulu nnaina śrīmatu karumāṇikka perumāḍināyakuṁḍu svasti śrīśaka varṣaṁbulu 1185
Agu nēṁṭi rudhirōdgārisaṁvatsara vaiśākha śu . 3 . gu . kūḍina Akṣayatṛtiyanānāṁḍu svasti śrī tribhuvanaika
laku trilakṣagrāma gōḷagirimahāmaṭhaśaivasāmrājyapaṭṭabaddha śrīmadrājagurucaraṇasara sīruhabhūṣita
mastaka śrītripurāṁttakadēvadivyaśrīpādapadmārādhaku laina śrīmatu śāntipūrvaśivadēśi kulu Abhi
navagaṇapāvuramunaṁdu kaṭṭiṁcina gaṇapasamudramuvenakanu dīpamunku tripurāṁttaka dēvara ni
vidyānaku Iccina maṟutulu tūrppuna Aidumaṟutulu tīrttambulāḍi vāsudēvaraku tripurāṁtakatūmu
na nityamu tūmubiyyamu Ōgiramunaḍacēdi dāniki Ācaṁdratārārkasthāyigānu dhārā pūrvakamu śēśi Icci
ri . veṁkkaṭavāsudēvaraku Akhaṁḍadīpānaku Iccinamōdālu 50 svasti maṁgaḷamahā śrīśrīśrī
Digital edition of SII 10.400 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
